          {
            "text": "      centerX,",

          },
          {
            "text": "      centerY,",
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "  });",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "text": "  const FLOOR_TILES = [TILE.FLOOR, TILE.STONE_FLOOR] as const;",
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "  const WALL_TILES = [TILE.WALL, TILE.RUBBLE] as const;",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let y = 0; y &lt; MAP_HEIGHT; y++) {",
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let x = 0; x &lt; MAP_WIDTH; x++) {",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "      const raw = rawMap[x][y];",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "      const isOpen = raw === 0 || raw === 2;",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (isOpen) {",
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "        const inRoom = taggedRooms.some(",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "text": "          (r) =&gt; x &gt;= r.x1 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= r.x2 &amp;&amp; y &gt;= r.y1 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= r.y2",
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "        );",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "text": "        ground[y][x] =",
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "text": "          FLOOR_TILES[Math.floor(Math.random() * FLOOR_TILES.length)];",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "text": "        if (inRoom) {",
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": "          ground[y][x] = TILE.STONE_FLOOR;",
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "text": "        walls[y][x] = TILE.EMPTY;",
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else {",
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "text": "        ground[y][x] = TILE.DIRT;",
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "text": "        walls[y][x] =",
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "text": "          WALL_TILES[Math.floor(Math.random() * WALL_TILES.length)];",
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let y = 1; y &lt; MAP_HEIGHT - 1; y++) {",
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let x = 1; x &lt; MAP_WIDTH - 1; x++) {",
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (walls[y][x] !== TILE.EMPTY) continue;",
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "text": "      const adjacentToWall = [",
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "text": "        [x - 1, y],",
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "text": "        [x + 1, y],",
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "text": "        [x, y - 1],",
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "text": "        [x, y + 1],",
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "text": "      ].some(([nx, ny]) =&gt; walls[ny]?.[nx] &amp;&amp; walls[ny][nx] !== TILE.EMPTY);",
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (adjacentToWall &amp;&amp; Math.random() &lt; 0.25) {",
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "text": "        decoration[y][x] = TILE.DEBRIS;",
            "lineNumber": 155
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else if (",
            "lineNumber": 156
          },
          {
            "text": "        !adjacentToWall &amp;&amp;",
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "text": "        ground[y][x] === TILE.STONE_FLOOR &amp;&amp;",
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "text": "        Math.random() &lt; 0.03",
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "text": "      ) {",
            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "text": "        decoration[y][x] = TILE.VINE;",
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 163
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165
          },
          {
            "text": "  // Corridor rubble: block some corridor tiles (distinct dark tiles, impassable)",
            "lineNumber": 166
          },
          {
            "text": "  const floodedTiles = new Set&lt;string&gt;();",
            "lineNumber": 167
          },

      "codeBlock": {

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export interface GeneratedMap {",
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  ground: MapLayer;",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "  walls: MapLayer;",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "  decoration: MapLayer;",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "  rooms: GeneratedRoom[];",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "  spawnX: number;",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "  spawnY: number;",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "  /** Tile coords \"x,y\" that are flooded (passable but slow) */",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "  floodedTiles: Set&lt;string&gt;;",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "  /** Tile coords \"x,y\" reachable from spawn (BFS after rubble). Items only placed here. */",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "  reachableTiles: Set&lt;string&gt;;",
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": " * Generate a procedural ruin map using ROT.Map.Digger.",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": " * Returns ground, walls, decoration layers + room metadata.",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "export function generateMap(): GeneratedMap {",
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  const ground: MapLayer = [];",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "  const walls: MapLayer = [];",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "  const decoration: MapLayer = [];",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let y = 0; y &lt; MAP_HEIGHT; y++) {",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "    ground.push(new Array(MAP_WIDTH).fill(TILE.DIRT));",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "    walls.push(new Array(MAP_WIDTH).fill(TILE.EMPTY));",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "    decoration.push(new Array(MAP_WIDTH).fill(TILE.EMPTY));",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "  const digger = new ROTMap.Digger(",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "    MAP_WIDTH,",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "    MAP_HEIGHT,",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "    {",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "      roomWidth: [5, 12],",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "      roomHeight: [4, 8],",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "      corridorLength: [2, 8],",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "      dugPercentage: 0.25,",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "  );",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "  const rawMap: number[][] = [];",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let x = 0; x &lt; MAP_WIDTH; x++) {",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "    rawMap[x] = new Array(MAP_HEIGHT).fill(1);",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "  digger.create((x: number, y: number, value: number) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (x &gt;= 0 &amp;&amp; x &lt; MAP_WIDTH &amp;&amp; y &gt;= 0 &amp;&amp; y &lt; MAP_HEIGHT) {",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "      rawMap[x][y] = value;",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "  });",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "  const rooms = digger.getRooms() as Array&lt;{ _x1: number; _y1: number; _x2: number; _y2: number }&gt;;",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "text": "  const roomNames = getRoomNames();",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "  const shuffledNames = [...roomNames].sort(() =&gt; Math.random() - 0.5);",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "  const taggedRooms: GeneratedRoom[] = rooms.map((room, i) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "    const x1 = room._x1;",
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "    const y1 = room._y1;",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "text": "    const x2 = room._x2;",
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "    const y2 = room._y2;",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "text": "    const centerX = Math.floor((x1 + x2) / 2);",
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "    const centerY = Math.floor((y1 + y2) / 2);",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "text": "    return {",
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "      name: shuffledNames[i % shuffledNames.length],",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "      x1,",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "  };",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 234,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },

          {
            "text": "export default class ExploreScene extends Scene {",

            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "text": "for (let i = 0; i &lt; npcCount &amp;&amp; i &lt; npcRoomData.length; i++) {",
            "lineNumber": 401
          },
          {
            "text": "const sortedByCenter = (a, b) =&gt; {",

          },

          },

          },

          {

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 424
          },
          {
            "text": "      const px = tile.x * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;",

          },

          },
          {

          },

            "lineNumber": 433
          },
          {
            "text": "      npcContainer.add(nTorchGlow);",
            "lineNumber": 434
          },
          {
            "text": "      const nShadow = this.add.graphics();",

          },
          {

          },

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 441
          },
          {

          },

          },

          },

          },

          },

          },

          },

          },

          },

          },

          },

          },

            "text": "export default class ExploreScene extends Scene {",

          {
            "text": "create() {",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 201
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.checkRoomEntry(spawnX, spawnY);",
            "lineNumber": 202
          },
          {
            "text": "    useGameStore.getState().actions.clearExploredTiles();",
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "text": "    useGameStore.getState().actions.setExplorableTileCount(this.mapData.reachableTiles.size);",

          },
          {
            "text": "    this.updateFOV(spawnX, spawnY);",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 206
          },
          {
            "text": "    // World bounds",
            "lineNumber": 207
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.physics.world.setBounds(",

          },
          {

          },

            "lineNumber": 210
          },

          },

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 214
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Camera",
            "lineNumber": 215
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.camera = this.cameras.main;",
            "lineNumber": 216
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.camera.setBounds(0, 0, MAP_WIDTH * TILE_SIZE, MAP_HEIGHT * TILE_SIZE);",
            "lineNumber": 217
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.camera.setZoom(1);",
            "lineNumber": 218
          },
          {

          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 221
          },
          {
            "text": "  private placeInteractives(",
            "lineNumber": 222
          },
          {
            "text": "    rooms: GeneratedRoom[],",
            "lineNumber": 223
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnX: number,",
            "lineNumber": 224
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnY: number",
            "lineNumber": 225
          },
          {
            "text": "  ): void {",
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "text": "    const { walls } = this.mapData;",
            "lineNumber": 227
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 228
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Transporter at spawn — container with shadow, rings, pulse (blue glow)",
            "lineNumber": 229
          },
          {
            "text": "    const tx = spawnX * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;",
            "lineNumber": 230
          },
          {
            "text": "    const ty = spawnY * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;",
            "lineNumber": 231
          },
          {
            "text": "    const transporterContainer = this.add.container(tx, ty);",
            "lineNumber": 232
          },
          {
            "text": "    transporterContainer.setDepth(5);",
            "lineNumber": 233
          },
          {
            "text": "    const tShadow = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 234
          },
          {
            "text": "    tShadow.fillStyle(0x1a1a2e, 0.6);",
            "lineNumber": 235
          },
          {
            "text": "    tShadow.fillCircle(0, 2, 14);",
            "lineNumber": 236
          },
          {
            "text": "    transporterContainer.add(tShadow);",
            "lineNumber": 237
          },
          {
            "text": "    const tOutline = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 238
          },
          {
            "text": "    tOutline.lineStyle(5, 0x1a1a2e, 1);",
            "lineNumber": 239
          },
          {
            "text": "    tOutline.strokeCircle(0, 0, 18);",
            "lineNumber": 240
          },
          {
            "text": "    transporterContainer.add(tOutline);",
            "lineNumber": 241
          },
          {
            "text": "    const tRing = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 242
          },
          {
            "text": "    tRing.lineStyle(3, 0x5cb3ff, 1); // Electric blue",
            "lineNumber": 243
          },
          {
            "text": "    tRing.strokeCircle(0, 0, 18);",
            "lineNumber": 244
          },
          {
            "text": "    transporterContainer.add(tRing);",
            "lineNumber": 245
          },
          {
            "text": "    transporterContainer.add(this.add.sprite(0, 0, 'transporter-pad'));",
            "lineNumber": 246
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.tweens.add({",
            "lineNumber": 247
          },
          {
            "text": "      targets: transporterContainer,",
            "lineNumber": 248
          },
          {
            "text": "      scale: 1.06,",
            "lineNumber": 249
          },
          {
            "text": "      duration: 1000,",
            "lineNumber": 250
          },
          {
            "text": "      yoyo: true,",
            "lineNumber": 251
          },
          {
            "text": "      repeat: -1,",
            "lineNumber": 252
          },
          {
            "text": "      ease: 'Sine.easeInOut',",
            "lineNumber": 253
          },
          {
            "text": "    });",
            "lineNumber": 254
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.interactionSystem.register({",
            "lineNumber": 255
          },
          {
            "text": "      id: 'transporter-1',",
            "lineNumber": 256
          },
          {
            "text": "      type: 'transporter',",
            "lineNumber": 257
          },
          {
            "text": "      gridX: spawnX,",
            "lineNumber": 258
          },
          {
            "text": "      gridY: spawnY,",
            "lineNumber": 259
          },
          {
            "text": "      label: 'Transporter pad',",
            "lineNumber": 260
          },
          {
            "text": "    });",
            "lineNumber": 261
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 571
          },

          {
            "text": "export default class ExploreScene extends Scene {",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "text": "    this.mapData = generateMap();",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "    const { ground, walls, decoration, rooms, spawnX, spawnY } = this.mapData;",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Create tilemap from raw data",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.tilemap = this.make.tilemap({",

          },
          {
            "text": "      data: ground,",

          },

            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "      tileHeight: TILE_SIZE,",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "    });",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "    const tileset = this.tilemap.addTilesetImage(",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "      'tileset',",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "      'tileset',",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "      TILE_SIZE,",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "      TILE_SIZE,",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "      0,",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "      0",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "    )!;",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Create layers (bottom to top: ground → walls → decoration)",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.groundLayer = this.tilemap.createLayer(0, tileset, 0, 0)!;",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.groundLayer.setDepth(0);",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Wall layer from separate data",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "    const wallMapData = this.make.tilemap({",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "      data: walls,",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "      tileWidth: TILE_SIZE,",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "      tileHeight: TILE_SIZE,",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "    });",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "    const wallTileset = wallMapData.addTilesetImage(",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "      'tileset',",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "      'tileset',",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "      TILE_SIZE,",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "      TILE_SIZE",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "    )!;",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.wallLayer = wallMapData.createLayer(0, wallTileset, 0, 0)!;",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.wallLayer.setDepth(1);",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.wallLayer.setCollision([4, 5]); // Wall and rubble block",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Decoration layer (non-blocking)",
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "    const decoMapData = this.make.tilemap({",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "      data: decoration,",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "      tileWidth: TILE_SIZE,",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "      tileHeight: TILE_SIZE,",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "text": "    });",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "    const decoTileset = decoMapData.addTilesetImage(",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "      'tileset',",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "      'tileset',",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "      TILE_SIZE,",
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "      TILE_SIZE",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "text": "    )!;",
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Wall outline — thin border along wall edges for clarity",
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.wallOutline = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Fog overlay — drawn on top of map, avoids Phaser layer APIs (see .cursor/rules)",

          },
          {
            "text": "    this.fogOverlay = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.fogOverlay.setDepth(4);",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Player entity",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.player = new Player(this, 'player', spawnX, spawnY);",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.player.setDirection('down');",
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.gridMovement = new GridMovement();",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.gridMovement.attach(this, this.player,",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",

          },
          {
            "text": "}",

      "score": 0.39897823333740234
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./.cursor/rules/index.mdc",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 83
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 115
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "3. Object placement (books, NPCs, items) happens on a separate layer",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "4. The Phaser scene loads the generated tilemap and places entities",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "### rot-js Imports",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "- Map: &#96;import { Map } from 'rot-js'&#96; → &#96;new Map.Digger(...)&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "- FOV: &#96;import { FOV } from 'rot-js'&#96; → &#96;new FOV.PreciseShadowcasting(lightPasses)&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": "- lightPasses(x, y) returns true when tile is walkable (not a wall)",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91
          },
          {
            "text": "### Player Entity (IControllablePlayer)",
            "lineNumber": 92
          },
          {
            "text": "- Uses a Phaser **Container** containing: highlight ring (Graphics) + sprite. Camera and GridMovement target the container via &#96;getSprite()&#96;.",
            "lineNumber": 93
          },
          {
            "text": "- &#96;getPixelPosition()&#96; for UI placement (e.g. interaction prompt above player). Don't assume &#96;getSprite()&#96; has &#96;.x&#96;/&#96;.y&#96; — use &#96;getPixelPosition()&#96;.",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "- Highlight ring is for accessibility; keep it when iterating on player visuals.",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "### Interaction System",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "- Prompts show **only when standing ON the interactive tile**, not when adjacent and facing. Avoid re-adding \"tile in front\" logic — it caused false prompts.",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "- **Battery pickups**: Stored as inventory (&#96;spareBatteries&#96;). Press **B** to use one (restores 50%). No waste when picking up at high battery.",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "### Depth Ordering (ExploreScene)",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "text": "- Ground 0, wall 1, decoration 2, wall outline 2.5, fog overlay 4, interactives 5, player 10, prompt 100. New visuals should slot into this order.",
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "text": "### Book Pickup Visibility",
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "- Books and their gold rings stay **full brightness** through fog — never dim. Makes them easy to spot when in FOV. Subtle scale pulse (1 ↔ 1.08) draws the eye.",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "### NPC Torchlight",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "- NPCs have a warm glow (torchlight) when in view — they look lit, but don't extend FOV (would spoil exploration).",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "### Object Placement",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "text": "- **No adjacent placement**: Books, NPCs, journals, and batteries must not be placed on tiles directly adjacent (cardinal directions) to each other, the spawn, or the transporter. Filter candidates with &#96;!isAdjacentToUsed(x, y)&#96; before placing.",
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "- **NPCs and books**: NPCs are never placed in the same room as a book fragment. Use &#96;roomsWithBooks&#96; to exclude those rooms from &#96;npcRoomData&#96;.",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "text": "### BootScene Procedural Textures",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "- Placeholder sprites (player, book-pickup, transporter-pad, npc) are created with &#96;add.graphics()&#96;, drawn, &#96;generateTexture(key, w, h)&#96;, then &#96;destroy()&#96;. Replace with asset loading when tilesets are ready.",
            "lineNumber": 115
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.39775609970092773
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/game/scenes/ExploreScene.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 25
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 762,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "signatures": {
          "ranges": [
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 26,
                "column": 1
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 26,
                "column": 16
              }
            },
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 26,
                "column": 16
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 27,
                "column": 3
              }
            },
            {
              "startPosition": {
                "line": 203,
                "column": 3
              },
              "endPosition": {
                "line": 208,
                "column": 5
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export default class ExploreScene extends Scene {",
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "private placeInteractives(",
            "lineNumber": 222
          },
          {
            "text": "    rooms: GeneratedRoom[],",
            "lineNumber": 223
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnX: number,",
            "lineNumber": 224
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnY: number",
            "lineNumber": 225
          },
          {
            "text": "  ): void {",
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "text": "const ;",
            "lineNumber": 288
          },
          {
            "text": "    const shuffledFar = [...farRooms].sort(() =&gt; Math.random() - 0.5);",
            "lineNumber": 289
          },
          {
            "text": "    const shuffledNear = [...nearRooms].sort(() =&gt; Math.random() - 0.5);",
            "lineNumber": 290
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 291
          },
          {
            "text": "    const roomsToUse: { room: GeneratedRoom; tiles: { x: number; y: number }[] }[] = [];",
            "lineNumber": 292
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (shuffledFar.length &gt; 0) roomsToUse.push(shuffledFar[0]);",
            "lineNumber": 293
          },
          {
            "text": "    const rest = [...shuffledFar.slice(1), ...shuffledNear].sort(() =&gt; Math.random() - 0.5);",
            "lineNumber": 294
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (const r of rest) {",
            "lineNumber": 295
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (roomsToUse.length &gt;= count) break;",
            "lineNumber": 296
          },
          {
            "text": "      roomsToUse.push(r);",
            "lineNumber": 297
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 298
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 299
          },
          {
            "text": "    const roomNamesWithBooks = roomsToUse.map((r) =&gt; r.room.name);",
            "lineNumber": 300
          },
          {
            "text": "    useGameStore.getState().actions.setRoomsWithBooksOnMap(roomNamesWithBooks);",
            "lineNumber": 301
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 302
          },
          {
            "text": "    const usedTiles = new Set&lt;string&gt;();",
            "lineNumber": 303
          },
          {
            "text": "    usedTiles.add(&#96;${spawnX},${spawnY}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 304
          },
          {
            "text": "    const isAdjacentToUsed = (x: number, y: number) =&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 305
          },
          {
            "text": "      usedTiles.has(&#96;${x - 1},${y}&#96;) || usedTiles.has(&#96;${x + 1},${y}&#96;) ||",
            "lineNumber": 306
          },
          {
            "text": "      usedTiles.has(&#96;${x},${y - 1}&#96;) || usedTiles.has(&#96;${x},${y + 1}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 307
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 308
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Check if a tile is a corridor/chokepoint (blocking it would prevent passage)",
            "lineNumber": 309
          },
          {
            "text": "    const isCorridorTile = (x: number, y: number): boolean =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 310
          },
          {
            "text": "      const { reachableTiles } = this.mapData;",
            "lineNumber": 311
          },
          {
            "text": "      const n = reachableTiles.has(&#96;${x},${y - 1}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 312
          },
          {
            "text": "      const s = reachableTiles.has(&#96;${x},${y + 1}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 313
          },
          {
            "text": "      const e = reachableTiles.has(&#96;${x + 1},${y}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 314
          },
          {
            "text": "      const w = reachableTiles.has(&#96;${x - 1},${y}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 315
          },
          {
            "text": "      const walkableNeighbors = [n, s, e, w].filter(Boolean).length;",
            "lineNumber": 316
          },
          {
            "text": "      ",
            "lineNumber": 317
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Corridor: exactly 2 opposite neighbors (N-S or E-W)",
            "lineNumber": 318
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (walkableNeighbors === 2) {",
            "lineNumber": 319
          },
          {
            "text": "        if ((n &amp;&amp; s) || (e &amp;&amp; w)) return true;",
            "lineNumber": 320
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 321
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Also consider doorways: 2-3 neighbors in a line pattern",
            "lineNumber": 322
          },
          {
            "text": "      // A tile with only 2 neighbors that aren't opposite is likely a corner, not a corridor",
            "lineNumber": 323
          },
          {
            "text": "      return false;",
            "lineNumber": 324
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 325
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 326
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let i = 0; i &lt; count &amp;&amp; i &lt; roomsToUse.length &amp;&amp; i &lt; fragments.length; i++) {",
            "lineNumber": 327
          },
          {
            "text": "      const { room, tiles } = roomsToUse[i];",
            "lineNumber": 328
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "text": "      const available = tiles.filter(",
            "lineNumber": 330
          },
          {
            "text": "        (t) =&gt; !usedTiles.has(&#96;${t.x},${t.y}&#96;) &amp;&amp; !isAdjacentToUsed(t.x, t.y)",
            "lineNumber": 331
          },
          {
            "text": "      );",
            "lineNumber": 332
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (available.length === 0) continue;",
            "lineNumber": 333
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 334
          },
          {
            "text": "      const tile = available[Math.floor(Math.random() * available.length)];",
            "lineNumber": 335
          },
          {
            "text": "      usedTiles.add(&#96;${tile.x},${tile.y}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 336
          },
          {
            "text": "      const bookCatalog = getBookCatalogSync();",
            "lineNumber": 337
          },
          {
            "text": "      const book = bookCatalog.find((b) =&gt; b.id === frag.bookId);",
            "lineNumber": 338
          },
          {
            "text": "      const label = &#96;${book?.title ?? 'Fragment'}: ${frag.label}&#96;;",
            "lineNumber": 339
          },
          {

          },

            "lineNumber": 341
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 342
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 343
          },

          },

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export default class ExploreScene extends Scene {",
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "create() {",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "const onPlayerMoved = ",

            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {

          },

            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "text": "    EventBridge.on('player-moved', onPlayerMoved);",
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.events.once('shutdown', () =&gt; EventBridge.off('player-moved', onPlayerMoved));",
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 153
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Beam-up animation and scene transition",
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "text": "    const onBeamUpConfirmed = () =&gt; {",

          },
          {

          },
          {

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.events.once('shutdown', () =&gt; EventBridge.off('beam-up-confirmed', onBeamUpConfirmed));",
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160
          },
          {
            "text": "    const onInteractiveConsumed = ({ type, id }: { type: string; id?: string }) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 161
          },
          {
            "text": "      const destroy = () =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 162
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "text": "          const container = this.bookContainers.get(id);",
            "lineNumber": 164
          },
          {
            "text": "          if (container) {",
            "lineNumber": 165
          },
          {
            "text": "            container.destroy();",
            "lineNumber": 166
          },
          {
            "text": "            this.bookContainers.delete(id);",

          },
          {
            "text": "          }",
            "lineNumber": 168
          },
          {
            "text": "          this.interactionSystem.unregister(id);",
            "lineNumber": 169
          },
          {
            "text": "          useGameStore.getState().actions.setBooksRemainingOnThisMap(this.bookContainers.size);",
            "lineNumber": 170
          },
          {
            "text": "          ",
            "lineNumber": 171
          },
          {
            "text": "          // Update roomsWithBooksOnMap to remove the room this book was in",
            "lineNumber": 172
          },
          {
            "text": "          const roomName = this.bookToRoomMap.get(id);",
            "lineNumber": 173
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 174
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 175
          },
          {
            "text": "            // Rebuild the list of rooms that still have books",
            "lineNumber": 176
          },
          {
            "text": "            const remainingRooms = new Set(this.bookToRoomMap.values());",
            "lineNumber": 177
          },
          {
            "text": "            useGameStore.getState().actions.setRoomsWithBooksOnMap(Array.from(remainingRooms));",

          },

            "lineNumber": 179
          },
          {

          },
          {
            "text": "          const container = this.journalContainers.get(id);",
            "lineNumber": 181
          },
          {
            "text": "          if (container) {",

          },
          {

          },
          {
            "text": "            this.journalContainers.delete(id);",
            "lineNumber": 184
          },
          {
            "text": "          }",
            "lineNumber": 185
          },
          {
            "text": "          this.interactionSystem.unregister(id);",
            "lineNumber": 186
          },
          {
            "text": "        } else if (type === 'battery' &amp;&amp; id) {",
            "lineNumber": 187
          },
          {
            "text": "          const container = this.batteryContainers.get(id);",
            "lineNumber": 188
          },
          {
            "text": "          if (container) {",
            "lineNumber": 189
          },
          {
            "text": "            container.destroy();",
            "lineNumber": 190
          },
          {
            "text": "            this.batteryContainers.delete(id);",
            "lineNumber": 191
          },
          {
            "text": "          }",
            "lineNumber": 192
          },
          {
            "text": "          this.interactionSystem.unregister(id);",
            "lineNumber": 193
          },
          {
            "text": "        }",
            "lineNumber": 194
          },
          {
            "text": "      };",
            "lineNumber": 195
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.time.delayedCall(50, destroy);",
            "lineNumber": 196
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 197
          },
          {
            "text": "    EventBridge.on('interactive-consumed', onInteractiveConsumed);",
            "lineNumber": 198
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 199
          },
          {

          },
          {

          },

          {
            "text": "export default class ExploreScene extends Scene {",

          {

          },
          {
            "text": "  ): void {",
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 388
          },
          {
            "text": "    const npcRoomData = roomData.filter(({ room }) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 389
          },
          {
            "text": "      const dx = Math.abs(room.centerX - spawnX);",
            "lineNumber": 390
          },
          {
            "text": "      const dy = Math.abs(room.centerY - spawnY);",
            "lineNumber": 391
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (dx &lt;= 1 &amp;&amp; dy &lt;= 1) return false; // exclude spawn room",
            "lineNumber": 392
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (roomsWithBooks.has(room)) return false; // exclude rooms with books",
            "lineNumber": 393
          },
          {
            "text": "      return true;",

          },
          {
            "text": "    });",
            "lineNumber": 395
          },
          {
            "text": "    const npcCount = Math.min(1 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 2), npcRoomData.length);",
            "lineNumber": 396
          },
          {
            "text": "    const npcCatalog = getNPCCatalogSync();",
            "lineNumber": 397
          },
          {
            "text": "    const npcsToPlace = [...npcCatalog].sort(() =&gt; Math.random() - 0.5).slice(0, npcCount);",
            "lineNumber": 398
          },
          {
            "text": "    const npcRooms: Record&lt;string, string&gt; = {};",
            "lineNumber": 399
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 400
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let i = 0; i &lt; npcCount &amp;&amp; i &lt; npcRoomData.length; i++) {",
            "lineNumber": 401
          },
          {
            "text": "      const { room, tiles } = npcRoomData[i];",
            "lineNumber": 402
          },
          {
            "text": "      const npc = npcsToPlace[i];",
            "lineNumber": 403
          },
          {
            "text": "      const available = tiles.filter(",
            "lineNumber": 404
          },
          {
            "text": "        (t) =&gt; !usedTiles.has(&#96;${t.x},${t.y}&#96;) &amp;&amp; ",
            "lineNumber": 405
          },
          {
            "text": "               !isAdjacentToUsed(t.x, t.y) &amp;&amp;",
            "lineNumber": 406
          },
          {
            "text": "               !isCorridorTile(t.x, t.y) // Don't block corridors/doorways",
            "lineNumber": 407
          },
          {
            "text": "      );",
            "lineNumber": 408
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (available.length === 0 || !npc) continue;",
            "lineNumber": 409
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 410
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Sort by distance to room center (prefer interior tiles, avoid doorways)",
            "lineNumber": 411
          },
          {
            "text": "      const sortedByCenter = [...available].sort((a, b) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 412
          },
          {
            "text": "        const distA = Math.abs(a.x - room.centerX) + Math.abs(a.y - room.centerY);",
            "lineNumber": 413
          },
          {
            "text": "        const distB = Math.abs(b.x - room.centerX) + Math.abs(b.y - room.centerY);",
            "lineNumber": 414
          },
          {
            "text": "        return distA - distB;",
            "lineNumber": 415
          },
          {
            "text": "      });",
            "lineNumber": 416
          },
          {
            "text": "      ",
            "lineNumber": 417
          },
          {
            "text": "      // Pick from the closest 30% to center (or at least top 2)",
            "lineNumber": 418
          },

            "text": "    }",

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export default class ExploreScene extends Scene {",
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "private placeInteractives(",
            "lineNumber": 222
          },
          {
            "text": "    rooms: GeneratedRoom[],",
            "lineNumber": 223
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnX: number,",
            "lineNumber": 224
          },
          {
            "text": "    spawnY: number",
            "lineNumber": 225
          },
          {
            "text": "  ): void {",
            "lineNumber": 226
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 466
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 467
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Journals: 1–2 per map, like books but different visual",
            "lineNumber": 468
          },
          {
            "text": "    const journalEntries = getRandomJournalEntriesSync(Math.min(2, roomData.length));",
            "lineNumber": 469
          },
          {
            "text": "    const shuffledRooms = [...roomData].sort(() =&gt; Math.random() - 0.5);",
            "lineNumber": 470
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let i = 0; i &lt; journalEntries.length; i++) {",
            "lineNumber": 471
          },
          {
            "text": "      const journal = journalEntries[i];",
            "lineNumber": 472
          },
          {
            "text": "      const roomWithSpace = shuffledRooms.find(({ tiles }) =&gt;",
            "lineNumber": 473
          },
          {
            "text": "        tiles.some((t) =&gt; !usedTiles.has(&#96;${t.x},${t.y}&#96;) &amp;&amp; !isAdjacentToUsed(t.x, t.y))",
            "lineNumber": 474
          },
          {
            "text": "      );",
            "lineNumber": 475
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (!roomWithSpace) break;",
            "lineNumber": 476
          },
          {
            "text": "      const available = roomWithSpace.tiles.filter(",
            "lineNumber": 477
          },
          {
            "text": "        (t) =&gt; !usedTiles.has(&#96;${t.x},${t.y}&#96;) &amp;&amp; !isAdjacentToUsed(t.x, t.y)",
            "lineNumber": 478
          },
          {
            "text": "      );",
            "lineNumber": 479
          },
          {
            "text": "      const tile = available[Math.floor(Math.random() * available.length)];",
            "lineNumber": 480
          },
          {
            "text": "      usedTiles.add(&#96;${tile.x},${tile.y}&#96;);",
            "lineNumber": 481
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 482
          },
          {
            "text": "      const px = tile.x * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;",
            "lineNumber": 483
          },
          {
            "text": "      const py = tile.y * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;",
            "lineNumber": 484
          },
          {
            "text": "      const container = this.add.container(px, py);",
            "lineNumber": 485
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.setDepth(5);",
            "lineNumber": 486
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 487
          },
          {
            "text": "      const shadow = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 488
          },
          {
            "text": "      shadow.fillStyle(0x1a1a2e, 0.6);",
            "lineNumber": 489
          },
          {
            "text": "      shadow.fillCircle(0, 2, 12);",
            "lineNumber": 490
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.add(shadow);",
            "lineNumber": 491
          },
          {
            "text": "      const outlineRing = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 492
          },
          {
            "text": "      outlineRing.lineStyle(5, 0x1a1a2e, 1);",
            "lineNumber": 493
          },
          {
            "text": "      outlineRing.strokeCircle(0, 0, 16);",
            "lineNumber": 494
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.add(outlineRing);",
            "lineNumber": 495
          },
          {
            "text": "      const ring = this.add.graphics();",
            "lineNumber": 496
          },
          {
            "text": "      ring.lineStyle(3, 0xb8860b, 1); // Dark goldenrod — aged paper/sepia",
            "lineNumber": 497
          },
          {
            "text": "      ring.strokeCircle(0, 0, 16);",
            "lineNumber": 498
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.add(ring);",
            "lineNumber": 499
          },
          {
            "text": "      const sprite = this.add.sprite(0, 0, 'journal-pickup');",
            "lineNumber": 500
          },
          {
            "text": "      container.add(sprite);",
            "lineNumber": 501
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.journalContainers.set(journal.id, container);",
            "lineNumber": 502
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 503
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.tweens.add({",
            "lineNumber": 504
          },
          {
            "text": "        targets: container,",
            "lineNumber": 505
          },
          {
            "text": "        scale: 1.05,",
            "lineNumber": 506
          },
          {
            "text": "        duration: 1200,",
            "lineNumber": 507
          },
          {
            "text": "        yoyo: true,",
            "lineNumber": 508
          },
          {
            "text": "        repeat: -1,",
            "lineNumber": 509
          },
          {
            "text": "        ease: 'Sine.easeInOut',",
            "lineNumber": 510
          },
          {
            "text": "      });",
            "lineNumber": 511
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.interactionSystem.register({",
            "lineNumber": 512
          },
          {
            "text": "        id: journal.id,",
            "lineNumber": 513
          },
          {
            "text": "        type: 'journal',",
            "lineNumber": 514
          },
          {
            "text": "        gridX: tile.x,",
            "lineNumber": 515
          },

          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 518
          },

            "lineNumber": 519
          },

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export default class ExploreScene extends Scene {",
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "create() {",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.player.setDirection('down');",
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.gridMovement = new GridMovement();",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.gridMovement.attach(this, this.player, {",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "text": "      wallLayer: this.wallLayer,",
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "      mapWidth: MAP_WIDTH,",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "      mapHeight: MAP_HEIGHT,",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "      getBlockedTiles: () =&gt; this.npcBlockedTiles,",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "text": "      getFloodedTiles: () =&gt; this.mapData.floodedTiles,",
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "text": "    });",
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Interaction system",
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.interactionSystem = new InteractionSystem();",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.interactionSystem.attach(this, this.player);",
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.placeInteractives(rooms, spawnX, spawnY);",
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Interaction prompt rendered via React (InteractionPrompt.tsx) to avoid Phaser Text/WebGL bugs",
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Mark expedition start (tracks library size for \"new fragments this trip\" calculation)",
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "text": "    useGameStore.getState().actions.startExpedition();",
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Reset battery at start of expedition",
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "text": "    useGameStore.getState().actions.setFlashlight(100);",
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.moveCount = 0;",
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "text": "    // Sync store on movement",
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "text": "    const onPlayerMoved = ({ x, y }: { x: number; y: number }) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "text": "      useGameStore.getState().actions.movePlayer({ x, y });",
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.moveCount++;",
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (this.moveCount % 5 === 0) {",
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "text": "        useGameStore.getState().actions.decrementFlashlight();",
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.checkRoomEntry(x, y);",
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.updateFOV(x, y);",
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "text": "    };",
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "text": "    EventBridge.on('player-moved', onPlayerMoved);",
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 220
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 763,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.35684850811958313
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./src/utils/mapUtils.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 7,
            "column": 34
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 84,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": " * Create a static test tilemap for Phase 1.3.",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": " * Ground layer, wall/collision layer, decoration layer.",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "export function createStaticTestMap(): {",
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  ground: MapLayer;",
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  walls: MapLayer;",
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  decoration: MapLayer;",
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "} {",
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  const ground: MapLayer = [];",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "  const walls: MapLayer = [];",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "  const decoration: MapLayer = [];",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let y = 0; y &lt; MAP_HEIGHT; y++) {",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "    ground.push([]);",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "    walls.push([]);",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "    decoration.push([]);",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "    for (let x = 0; x &lt; MAP_WIDTH; x++) {",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "      const isBorder =",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "        x === 0 || x === MAP_WIDTH - 1 || y === 0 || y === MAP_HEIGHT - 1;",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "      const inRoom1 =",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "        x &gt;= 5 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= 15 &amp;&amp; y &gt;= 5 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= 15; // Library wing",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "      const inRoom2 =",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "        x &gt;= 30 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= 45 &amp;&amp; y &gt;= 10 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= 25; // Reading room",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "      const inRoom3 = x &gt;= 20 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= 35 &amp;&amp; y &gt;= 35 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= 45; // Courtyard",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "      const inCorridor =",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "        (x &gt;= 15 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= 25 &amp;&amp; y &gt;= 20 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= 30) ||",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "        (y &gt;= 15 &amp;&amp; y &lt;= 20 &amp;&amp; x &gt;= 15 &amp;&amp; x &lt;= 45);",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (isBorder) {",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "        walls[y][x] = TILE.WALL;",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "        ground[y][x] = TILE.DIRT;",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else if (inRoom1 || inRoom2) {",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "        ground[y][x] = TILE.STONE_FLOOR;",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "        walls[y][x] = TILE.EMPTY;",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else if (inRoom3) {",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "        ground[y][x] = TILE.GRASS;",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "        walls[y][x] = TILE.EMPTY;",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else if (inCorridor) {",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "        ground[y][x] = TILE.FLOOR;",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "        walls[y][x] = TILE.EMPTY;",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "      } else {",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "        ground[y][x] = x % 3 === 0 ? TILE.GRASS : TILE.DIRT;",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "        walls[y][x] = Math.random() &lt; 0.03 ? TILE.RUBBLE : TILE.EMPTY;",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "      decoration[y][x] = TILE.EMPTY;",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (walls[y][x] === TILE.EMPTY &amp;&amp; Math.random() &lt; 0.02) {",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "        decoration[y][x] = Math.random() &lt; 0.5 ? TILE.VINE : TILE.DEBRIS;",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "  // Wall boundaries for rooms",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let x = 5; x &lt;= 15; x++) {",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "    walls[5][x] = TILE.WALL;",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "    walls[15][x] = TILE.WALL;",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let y = 5; y &lt;= 15; y++) {",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "    walls[y][5] = TILE.WALL;",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "    walls[y][15] = TILE.WALL;",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "  walls[10][5] = TILE.EMPTY; // Door",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "  for (let x = 30; x &lt;= 45; x++) {",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "    walls[10][x] = TILE.WALL;",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.343686044216156
    },

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": " * rot.js → Phaser tilemap pipeline.",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": " * Uses ROT.Map.Digger for interior ruins; transforms to Phaser-compatible layers.",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "import { Map as ROTMap } from 'rot-js';",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "import { MAP_WIDTH, MAP_HEIGHT } from '@/config/gameConfig';",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "import { TILE } from '@/data/tilesets';",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "import type { MapLayer } from '@/utils/mapUtils';",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "// Default room names - used as fallback if content not loaded",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "const DEFAULT_ROOM_NAMES = [",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "  'library wing',",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "  'reading room',",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "  'archives',",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "  'courtyard',",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "  'stacks',",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "  'rotunda',",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "  'vestibule',",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "  'study',",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "  'scriptorium',",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "] as const;",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "// Cached room names loaded from content/rooms.yaml",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "let _roomNamesCache: string[] | null = null;",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "export function setRoomNamesCache(names: string[]): void {",
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  _roomNamesCache = names;",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "export function getRoomNames(): string[] {",
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  return _roomNamesCache ?? [...DEFAULT_ROOM_NAMES];",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "export interface GeneratedRoom {",
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  name: string;",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "  x1: number;",

          },
          {

          },

          {

          },
          {
            "text": "import {",

          },
          {
            "text": "  generateMap,",

          },
          {
            "text": "  getRoomAt,",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "  getOpenTilesInRoom,",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {

          {

            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {

          },
          {

          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "/**",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./PLAN.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 242
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 275
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "  discovered: boolean;",
            "lineNumber": 243
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 244
          },
          {
            "text": "&#96;&#96;&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 245
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create an initial book catalog with 3-5 books, each with a few fragments loaded:",
            "lineNumber": 246
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Dante's Inferno (select 3-4 cantos)",
            "lineNumber": 247
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Shakespeare's The Tempest (5 acts)",
            "lineNumber": 248
          },
          {
            "text": "  - One of Chaucer's Canterbury Tales (e.g., The Knight's Tale)",
            "lineNumber": 249
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Edmund Spenser's Faerie Queene (2-3 cantos from Book I)",
            "lineNumber": 250
          },
          {
            "text": "  - A shorter work: perhaps some of Emily Dickinson's poems as individual fragments",
            "lineNumber": 251
          },
          {
            "text": "  - King James Bible (5-8 iconic chapters, e.g. Genesis 1, Psalm 23, Matthew 5-7, 1 Corinthians 13, Revelation 21 — KJV for thematic \"preserving old texts\" flavor; Gutenberg has it). (Strategies for adding the full Bible deferred to a later phase.)",
            "lineNumber": 252
          },
          {
            "text": "  (Pull actual text from Project Gutenberg — these are all public domain)",
            "lineNumber": 253
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create BookPickup.ts entity:",
            "lineNumber": 254
          },
          {
            "text": "  - A glowing sprite placed on the map in rot.js-generated rooms",
            "lineNumber": 255
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Registers with the Interaction system as type 'book'",
            "lineNumber": 256
          },
          {
            "text": "  - When interacted with: emit 'book-found' event, show book detail, add to store",
            "lineNumber": 257
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Visual feedback: particle effect or glow animation on pickup (deferred; book-pickup sprite used)",
            "lineNumber": 258
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Place 2-4 book fragments per generated map, always inside rooms",
            "lineNumber": 259
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Placement algorithm:",
            "lineNumber": 260
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Pick random rooms from the rot.js room list",
            "lineNumber": 261
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Place fragment at a random open tile within the room",
            "lineNumber": 262
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Ensure no two fragments in the same room",
            "lineNumber": 263
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Ensure at least one fragment is in a room far from spawn",
            "lineNumber": 264
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265

          {

          },

            "text": "    - **Eli** — A scavenger who hints at where rare books might be found.",
            "lineNumber": 271
          },

          },

          },
