          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 188
          },
          {
            "text": "### 1.7 — Phase 1 Milestone ✅",
            "lineNumber": 189
          },
          {
            "text": "**✅ Done when**: You can move a character on a tile-based map, bump into walls,",
            "lineNumber": 190
          },
          {
            "text": "face an object and see an interaction prompt, and see a basic HUD overlay.",
            "lineNumber": 191
          },
          {
            "text": "The accessible event log quietly captures movement and interaction events.",
            "lineNumber": 192
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 193
          },
          {
            "text": "---",
            "lineNumber": 194
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 195
          },
          {
            "text": "## Phase 2: Core Game Loop (Proof of Concept)",
            "lineNumber": 196
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 197
          },
          {
            "text": "### 2.1 — Procedural Map Generation",
            "lineNumber": 198
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Create MapGenerator.ts using rot.js:",
            "lineNumber": 199
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Use &#96;ROT.Map.Digger&#96; for interior ruins (hallways, rooms)",
            "lineNumber": 200
          },
          {
            "text": "  - (ROT.Map.Cellular for overgrown outdoor — deferred; Digger + decoration suffices)",
            "lineNumber": 201
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Generate a 50x50 tile map as a 2D number array",
            "lineNumber": 202
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Transform the rot.js output into Phaser tilemap-compatible data:",
            "lineNumber": 203
          },
          {
            "text": "    - 0 (open) → random floor/ground tile indices",
            "lineNumber": 204
          },
          {
            "text": "    - 1 (wall) → random wall/rubble tile indices",
            "lineNumber": 205
          },
          {
            "text": "    - Apply variety: multiple tile indices per type for visual interest",
            "lineNumber": 206
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Create the tilemap dynamically in Phaser using &#96;this.make.tilemap({ data, tileWidth: 32, tileHeight: 32 })&#96;",
            "lineNumber": 207
          },
          {
            "text": "- [x] Add a decoration pass:",
            "lineNumber": 208
          },
          {
            "text": "  - Scatter vegetation (vines) on floor tiles (low probability)",
            "lineNumber": 209
          }
        ]

          {
            "text": "/**",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": " * Proximity-based interaction detection.",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": " * 'on' interactives (books, journals, transporter): prompt when standing ON the tile.",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": " * 'adjacent' interactives (NPCs): prompt when standing next to the tile (solid, block movement).",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": " * Emits interaction-available and interaction-triggered via EventBridge.",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": " */",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "export class InteractionSystem {",
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "  private scene: Scene | null = null;",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "  private player: IControllablePlayer | null = null;",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "  private interactives: Interactive[] = [];",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "  private currentInteractive: Interactive | null = null;",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "  private boundKeyHandler: ((e: KeyboardEvent) =&gt; void) | null = null;",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "  private isPlayerMoving = false;",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "  private lastInteractionTime = 0;",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "  private onPlayerMoving = () =&gt; { this.isPlayerMoving = true; };",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "  private onPlayerMoved = () =&gt; { this.isPlayerMoving = false; };",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "  /** Register an interactive object (called when entities spawn) */",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "  register(interactive: Interactive): void {",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!this.interactives.some((i) =&gt; i.id === interactive.id)) {",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.interactives.push(interactive);",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "  unregister(id: string): void {",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.interactives = this.interactives.filter((i) =&gt; i.id !== id);",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.28298044204711914
    },

      "codeBlock": {

        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "export class InteractionSystem {",
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "detach(): void {",
            "lineNumber": 90
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.scene = null;",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.player = null;",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.interactives = [];",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.currentInteractive = null;",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "    this.boundKeyHandler = null;",
            "lineNumber": 100
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 101
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102
          },
          {
            "text": "  /** Call every frame; only shows prompt when standing on the interactive tile */",
            "lineNumber": 103
          },
          {
            "text": "  update(): void {",
            "lineNumber": 104
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (!this.player) return;",
            "lineNumber": 105
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (this.isPlayerMoving) {",
            "lineNumber": 107
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (this.currentInteractive) {",
            "lineNumber": 108
          },
          {
            "text": "        this.currentInteractive = null;",
            "lineNumber": 109
          },
          {
            "text": "        EventBridge.emit('interaction-available', { type: '', label: undefined });",
            "lineNumber": 110
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 111
          },
          {
            "text": "      return;",
            "lineNumber": 112
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 113
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "    const pos = this.player.getGridPosition();",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "text": "    const found = this.interactives.find((i) =&gt; {",
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "      const range = i.interactionRange ?? 'on';",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "      if (range === 'on') {",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "text": "        return i.gridX === pos.x &amp;&amp; i.gridY === pos.y;",
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "      }",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "      // adjacent: manhattan distance 1 (standing next to NPC)",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "      const dx = Math.abs(pos.x - i.gridX);",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "text": "      const dy = Math.abs(pos.y - i.gridY);",
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "text": "      return (dx === 1 &amp;&amp; dy === 0) || (dx === 0 &amp;&amp; dy === 1);",
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "    });",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "    if (found &amp;&amp; found.id !== this.currentInteractive?.id) {",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.currentInteractive = found;",
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "text": "      EventBridge.emit('interaction-available', {",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "text": "        type: found.type,",
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": "        label: found.label,",
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "text": "      });",
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "text": "    } else if (!found &amp;&amp; this.currentInteractive) {",
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.currentInteractive = null;",
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "text": "      EventBridge.emit('interaction-available', { type: '', label: undefined });",
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "text": "    } else if (found) {",
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "text": "      this.currentInteractive = found;",
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "text": "    }",
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "text": "  }",
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "text": "}",
            "lineNumber": 141,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },

## How Interactables Work in Starship Alexandria

### 1. BookPickup Implementation

`BookPickup.ts` is currently a stub. Interactables are implemented directly in `ExploreScene.ts` using Phaser Containers, not separate entity classes.

### 2. Interaction System (`src/game/systems/Interaction.ts`)

The `InteractionSystem` class manages all interactables:

**Key Methods:**
- `register(interactive: Interactive)` - Register an interactive object when it spawns
- `unregister(id: string)` - Remove an interactive when consumed
- `attach(scene, player)` - Attach to scene and set up keyboard handlers
- `update()` - Called every frame; detects proximity and emits `interaction-available`

**Interaction Detection:**
```typescript
// Two interaction ranges:
- 'on' (default): Player must stand ON the tile (books, journals, transporter, batteries)
- 'adjacent': Player stands next to tile (NPCs - they block movement)
```

**Keyboard Handling:**
- Listens for `KeyE` or `Space`
- Has 300ms cooldown to prevent double-triggers
- Checks `gamePhase` (blocks during 'dialogue' or 'reading')
- Uses global `interactionLocked` flag during state transitions
- Emits `interaction-triggered` event with `{ type, id }`

### 3. Interactive Type Definition (`src/types/game.ts`)

```typescript
export type InteractiveType = 'book' | 'npc' | 'journal' | 'transporter' | 'battery';

export interface Interactive {
  id: string;
  type: InteractiveType;
  gridX: number;
  gridY: number;
  label?: string;
  interactionRange?: 'on' | 'adjacent'; // defaults to 'on'
}
```

### 4. Placement Pattern (`ExploreScene.placeInteractives()`)

**Common Placement Rules:**
- All interactables use `usedTiles` Set to track occupied positions
- `isAdjacentToUsed()` prevents placing objects adjacent to each other, spawn, or transporter
- Only placed on `reachableTiles` (BFS from spawn, after rubble)
- Depth: All interactables use `container.setDepth(5)`

**Placement Flow:**
1. Transporter placed at spawn first
2. Books: 2-4 per map, one per room, never in spawn room
3. NPCs: 1-2 per map, never in spawn room, never in same room as books
4. Journals: 1-2 per map, placed in any available room
5. Batteries: 1-2 per map, same rules as books

**Example Placement Code (Books):**
```typescript
// Get available tiles in room
const available = tiles.filter(
  (t) => !usedTiles.has(`${t.x},${t.y}`) && 
         !isAdjacentToUsed(t.x, t.y)
);

// Pick random tile
const tile = available[Math.floor(Math.random() * available.length)];
usedTiles.add(`${tile.x},${tile.y}`);

// Calculate pixel position
const px = tile.x * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;
const py = tile.y * TILE_SIZE + TILE_SIZE / 2;
```

### 5. Visual Styling Pattern

All interactables follow a consistent visual pattern:

**Standard Container Structure:**
```typescript
const container = this.add.container(px, py);
container.setDepth(5);

// 1. Shadow (dark circle underneath)
const shadow = this.add.graphics();
shadow.fillStyle(0x1a1a2e, 0.6);
shadow.fillCircle(0, 2, 14); // radius varies by type
container.add(shadow);

// 2. Dark outline ring (strong silhouette)
const outlineRing = this.add.graphics();
outlineRing.lineStyle(5, 0x1a1a2e, 1);
outlineRing.strokeCircle(0, 0, 18); // radius varies
container.add(outlineRing);

// 3. Colored highlight ring (type-specific color)
const ring = this.add.graphics();
ring.lineStyle(3, COLOR, 1); // Color varies by type
ring.strokeCircle(0, 0, 18);
container.add(ring);

// 4. Sprite
const sprite = this.add.sprite(0, 0, 'sprite-key');
container.add(sprite);

// 5. Pulse animation
this.tweens.add({
  targets: container,
  scale: 1.08, // varies: 1.05-1.08
  duration: 900, // varies: 900-1200ms
  yoyo: true,
  repeat: -1,
  ease: 'Sine.easeInOut',
});
```

**Color Scheme by Type:**
- Books: `0xd4af37` (Gold) - radius 18, scale 1.08, dura
